# @representative/adapters-graphql

GraphQL adapter package that binds generated contract documents to approved runtime transport and cache policy.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @representative/adapters-graphql
Version: 1.0.0
Component: graphql-adapter
Type: library
System: representative-enterprise-react
Domain: integration
Bounded context: graphql-runtime
Owner: team-adapter
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-adapter
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own GraphQL runtime fetcher/client binding
- Integrate generated TypedDocumentNode operations with TanStack Query or Apollo Client
- Handle transport errors, auth headers, cache policy, and retry boundaries

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define GraphQL schema contracts
- Does not own feature workflow composition
- Does not contain domain policy logic

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by app or feature edge packages where runtime GraphQL transport is allowed
- Consume generated contract documents from the contract package

## Boundaries

### Allowed consumers

```text
application
feature
```

### Forbidden consumers

```text
domain
ui
```

test

- Adapter package proves transport ownership remains separate from schema/operation ownership
